content.rendered:
Achieving seamless ZKTeco integration is one of the most effective ways to modernize your company’s HR operations. In an era where manual data entry and spreadsheet management are becoming obsolete, bridging the gap between your physical biometric hardware and your digital HR platform is essential for accuracy and efficiency. At Attendo, we have streamlined this process to ensure your attendance data is always precise, secure, and accessible in real-time.

Why Manual Attendance Tracking is Failing You

For years, HR managers have struggled with the disconnect between attendance devices and payroll software. Typically, this involves downloading data from a device via USB, converting difficult CSV files, and manually uploading them into a system. This process is not only time-consuming but also prone to human error.

With our advanced ZKTeco integration, this friction is completely eliminated. By using the Attendo Biometric Device Sync addon, you can automate the flow of data from your office entry points directly to your “Attendance” module. This ensures that when an employee scans their finger or face at the door, their status is instantly updated on the HR dashboard.

Supported Devices: Speed, Security, and Precision

We understand that different businesses have different security needs. That is why our ZKTeco integration currently supports two of the industry’s most reliable devices out of the box.

1. ZKTeco SpeedFace V5L

In a post-pandemic world, hygiene and speed are top priorities. The SpeedFace V5L is a high-performance Visible Light Facial Recognition terminal. It is designed for high-traffic areas where employees need to clock in without touching a surface.

  • Fast Recognition: Identifies users in less than a second.
  • Anti-Spoofing: Prevents attendance fraud using photos or videos.
  • Hygiene: Completely touchless interaction.

2. ZKTeco F18

For businesses looking for a cost-effective yet highly secure solution, the F18 is a classic choice. It is a biometric fingerprint reader that offers high precision.

  • Reliability: Proven algorithm for accurate fingerprint matching.
  • Durability: Built to withstand daily usage in busy office environments.
  • Dual-Mode: Supports both fingerprint and RFID cards for flexibility.

How the Integration Enhances Your Workflow

Implementing ZKTeco integration goes beyond just seeing a clock-in time. It fundamentally changes how you manage your workforce features within Attendo.

  • Automated Payroll Processing: One of the biggest headaches for HR is calculating salary based on working hours. With device syncing, the “Payroll” module in Attendo automatically receives the exact working hours, late arrivals, and overtime data. This means you can generate salary sheets with 100% accuracy at the click of a button.
  • Real-Time Dashboard Insights: Managers no longer have to wait until the end of the month to see who is late. The “HR Dashboard” and “Admin Dashboard” reflect device data instantly, showing you who is “In,” on “Break,” or “Absent” as it happens.
  • Eliminating Time Theft: Buddy punching (one employee clocking in for another) is a major issue with card-based systems. Biometric integration ensures that the person clocking in is physically present, securing your company’s resources.

Customization: We Adapt to Your Hardware

We recognize that your office might already have existing infrastructure. While our system is pre-configured for the SpeedFace V5L and F18, we know that many organizations utilize legacy systems or different models.

If you have other devices, then we can do customization.

Our development team is equipped to build custom APIs and drivers to bridge Attendo with a wide variety of other ZKTeco models or even different brands like Anviz. Whether you are using older fingerprint scanners or newer palm-vein recognition technology, we can tailor our system to read your device’s data stream.

You can see more integration details in the More Article on Integration

Know more about the device: SpeedFace-V5L Series , ZKTeco F18

Conclusion

Don’t let outdated hardware hold your HR department back. By leveraging ZKTeco integration, you free up your HR team to focus on employee engagement and strategy rather than data entry. With support for top-tier devices and the flexibility to customize for others, Attendo is your partner in building a smarter, more efficient workplace.

Ready to sync your devices? Contact our support team today to get started!
